original_image_tags: Circular postmark stamp. Text reads: "BRADFORD, PA. DEC 20 PM 9961".

elements.description: Typed letter on FBI Office of Director letterhead. The page contains typed text including a date (December 23, 1966), a recipient address block for Judith Goodman, a handwritten annotation 'Flying Saucers' above the addressee 'Mr. J. Edgar Hoover', and the body of the letter requesting information on U.F.O.s for a Science Fair project. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, or maps on the page.
Circular postal stamp in the lower left reading 'BRADFORD, PA. DEC 20 PM 9961'. There is also a faint rectangular stamp reading 'EX-108' near the bottom center.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the circular postal stamp text and its location, but description B adds a detail (a faint rectangular stamp) that description A omits without contradiction.
